title: Amtech G1520 Midget trowel with soft grip
features: COMFORTABLE TO USE: This handy midget trowel has a soft grip handle for comfort
VERSATILE: 175 x 75mm in size, it is an ideal plastering tool for hard to reach areas where standard sized trowels will not fit
SIZE CAPACITY: 75 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Protect your eyes when digging and avoid contact with underground utilities. Box Contains 1x Trowel See more
